testsuite.name: rating rules oracle — headless (the CI-safe pipeline stage)

testcase.name: young-collision-ca — young driver, collision, California — the young-driver loading fires
testcase.system-out: * expected = * result = Rule.execute('rating', __row).output * exp = expected[__row.id] * result.monthlyPremium == exp.monthlyPremium * result.currency == 'USD'

testcase.name: prior-claims-comprehensive-ny — adult with prior claims, comprehensive, New York — the prior-claims surcharge fires
testcase.system-out: * expected = * result = Rule.execute('rating', __row).output * exp = expected[__row.id] * result.monthlyPremium == exp.monthlyPremium * result.currency == 'USD'

testcase.name: clean-liability-tx — adult, clean record, liability, Texas — the base case, no loadings
testcase.system-out: * expected = * result = Rule.execute('rating', __row).output * exp = expected[__row.id] * result.monthlyPremium == exp.monthlyPremium * result.currency == 'USD'
